prompt: Create a patients schema with tables: patients (id, clinic_id, patient_uid, full_name, date_of_birth, gender, phone, email, address, blood_group, emergency_contact_name, emergency_contact_phone, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at) and patient_medical_info (id, patient_id, clinic_id, allergies, chronic_conditions, current_medications, family_history, notes, updated_at). Reference the clinics table already created.
